Events calendar

http://www.chihhh.org.uk/diary

SUBSCRIBE TO CHIHHH CALENDAR

Do you use a calendar on your computer, iphone, or tablet?
Well now you can subscribe to the CHIHHH events calendar. This will automatically write and update all the CHIHHH events onto your own calendar.
Examples of computer calendars are: iCal on iphones and ipads and Macs; Outlook Calendar on Windows machines; or Google calendar online.
To subscribe simple click on the link under Events Calendar.
Further details of these calendars and others can be found here:
http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ICalendar
This will either automatically take you to the subscription details on your calendar.
If clicking on the link takes you to another webpage. Then copy the link and paste it into the subscription window in your calendar.
Or it may download a file called calendar.ics, once downloaded click on it to start the process, or use it to import the dates into other calendar applications like Gmail etc.
New entries may take 24 hours to appear.
If you need help with this, contact Spiderman.

Check the web for late changes or phone one of the contacts
Phone 07708311487 if you can't find the venue.
